goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:15' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'travel time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of entertainment
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of college
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:15 and should depart from peterborough
The train should leave on thursday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time, travel time, and train ID
